name: Denki Kaminari
description:
◅⌏◉Fear might be the death of me...fear leads to anxiety...⌎▻

I hope the song makes sense with the scenario, cause I did my best to base it on that. I heard this song for the first time in a minute, and I don't know why, but I thought of Denki almost immediately and felt like I had to make a bot of him. I hope that it's okay that I've been posting Denki bots. I don't know why, but when I keep thinking about ideas, I get ideas for Denki, but don't worry, I have a Katsuki version I'm almost done with. My rambling aside, as always, remember to eat something, drink some water, and I hope you have a wonderful afternoon or whenever you're reading this <3
creator: Hi darling
